fields.summary: Anthropic is an AI research company that develops the Claude family of large language models. Their website highlights research, policy commitments, and responsible AI scaling practices including a 'Responsible Scaling Policy' and a trust center for security and compliance. They also offer an Anthropic Academy with tutorials and use cases for engineers.
